query:
-- What are the 600 services with revenue > 0 but no matched billing items?
-- Check their supplier, service type, and how revenue was set
SELECT 
  supplierName,
  serviceType,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalRevenue,
  ROUND(AVG(monthlyRevenue), 2) as avgRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi 
    WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
      AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  )
GROUP BY supplierName, serviceType
ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- What are the 600 services with revenue > 0 but no matched billing items?
-- Check their supplier, service type, and how revenue was set
SELECT 
  supplierName,
  serviceType,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalRevenue,
  ROUND(AVG(monthlyRevenue), 2) as avgRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi 
    WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
      AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  )
GROUP BY supplierName, serviceType
ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC
LIMIT 20;
